name: Standard Course Bread for Bread Makers
recipeInstructions:
1. PLACE ALL INGREDIENTS INTO THE BREAD MAKER IN THE ORDER SHOWN.
2. NOTE: IF THE ROOM TEMPERATURE IS ABOVE 82 DEGREES, USE COLD WATER (ABOUT 41 DEGREES). IF THE ROOM TEMPERATURE IS BELOW 50 DEGREES, USE LUKEWARM WATER (ABOUT 100 DEGREES).
